mapper.select:
SELECT a.id AS activityId, a.biz_type AS bizType, a.cover_url AS activityCover, a.delivery_type AS deliveryType, a.week_days AS weekDays, a.stock_mode AS stockMode, a.countdown_enabled AS countdownEnabled, a.countdown_minutes AS countdownMinutes, a.sold_out_action AS soldOutAction, a.purchase_limit AS purchaseLimit, DATE_FORMAT(a.start_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS startTime, DATE_FORMAT(a.end_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS endTime, DATE_FORMAT(a.activity_start_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS activityStartDate, DATE_FORMAT(a.activity_end_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS activityEndDate, p.product_id AS productId, p.flash_sale_price AS flashSalePrice, p.activity_stock AS activityStock, p.sold_count AS soldCount, AS productName, AS originPrice, AS productCover FROM mk_flash_sale_activity a JOIN mk_flash_sale_product p ON p.activity_id = a.id AND p.deleted = 0 WHERE a.deleted = 0 AND a.status = 1 AND ( (a.delivery_type = 1 AND a.end_time >= NOW() AND a.start_time <= DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 DAY)) OR (a.delivery_type = 2 AND a.activity_end_date >= CURDATE() AND a.activity_start_date <= CURDATE()) )
AND (case a.biz_type when 2 then (select (IFNULL(storeAddrIds,'') = '' or find_in_set(#{storeAddrId}, storeAddrIds) > 0) and (IFNULL(showStoreAddrIds,'') = '' or find_in_set(#{storeAddrId}, showStoreAddrIds) > 0) from fit_card where fitCardId = p.product_id) when 3 then (select (IFNULL(store_addr_ids,'') = '' or find_in_set(#{storeAddrId}, store_addr_ids) > 0) from vip_benefit_card where vip_card_id = p.product_id) else 1 end) = 1
ORDER BY a.id DESC, p.id ASC
SELECT stock_mode FROM mk_flash_sale_activity WHERE id = #{activityId}
SELECT start_hm AS startHm, end_hm AS endHm FROM mk_flash_sale_time_slot WHERE activity_id = #{activityId} ORDER BY id ASC

SELECT a.id AS activityId, a.biz_type AS bizType, a.delivery_type AS deliveryType, a.week_days AS weekDays, a.stock_mode AS stockMode, a.purchase_limit AS purchaseLimit, DATE_FORMAT(a.start_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS startTime, DATE_FORMAT(a.end_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS endTime, DATE_FORMAT(a.activity_start_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS activityStartDate, DATE_FORMAT(a.activity_end_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS activityEndDate, p.product_id AS productId, p.flash_sale_price AS flashSalePrice, p.activity_stock AS activityStock, p.sold_count AS soldCount FROM mk_flash_sale_activity a JOIN mk_flash_sale_product p ON p.activity_id = a.id AND p.deleted = 0 WHERE a.id = #{activityId} AND a.deleted = 0 AND a.status = 1 AND p.product_id = #{productId} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE mk_flash_sale_product SET sold_count = sold_count + 1 WHERE activity_id = #{activityId} AND product_id = #{productId} AND deleted = 0 AND sold_count < activity_stock
UPDATE mk_flash_sale_product SET sold_count = sold_count + 1 WHERE activity_id = #{activityId} AND product_id = #{productId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO mk_flash_sale_daily_sold (activity_id, product_id, sold_date, sold_count) VALUES (#{activityId}, #{productId}, #{soldDate}, 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE mk_flash_sale_daily_sold d SET d.sold_count = d.sold_count + 1 WHERE d.activity_id = #{activityId} AND d.product_id = #{productId} AND d.sold_date = #{soldDate} AND d.sold_count < (SELECT activity_stock FROM mk_flash_sale_product WHERE activity_id = #{activityId} AND product_id = #{productId} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1)
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE((SELECT sold_count FROM mk_flash_sale_daily_sold WHERE activity_id = #{activityId} AND product_id = #{productId} AND sold_date = #{soldDate}), 0)
